hero.title:
Discover the soul
of Catalan wine
hero.subtitle: Over 100 wineries open their doors to you. Exclusive tastings, harvests and routes through the most singular landscapes of Catalunya.

penedes.name: Penedès
penedes.tagline: The heartland of cava and great Catalan whites

priorat.name: Priorat
priorat.tagline: Volcanic terroir and distinctive author reds

emporda.name: Empordà
emporda.tagline: Vineyards by the sea, between Mediterranean breeze and tramontane

alella.name: Alella
alella.tagline: The smallest DO, right at Barcelona's doorstep

bages.name: Bages
bages.tagline: Inland vineyards at 450 metres, freshness and character

experiences.heading: Featured experiences
experiences.subheading: Tastings, visits and experiences designed by the finest wineries

steps.title: Choose your experience
steps.desc: Filter by region, wine style or date. More than 300 unique experiences are waiting for you across Catalunya.

steps.title: Book in seconds
steps.desc: Secure online payment. Instant confirmation and all the details to reach the winery delivered straight to your inbox.

steps.title: Live the moment
steps.desc: The winery welcomes you. Uncork, learn and take home the finest wines directly.

wineryForm.heading: List your winery, for free
wineryForm.pitch: Join over 100 wineries already receiving visitors through Vinya.wine. No setup fee, no lock-in. You only pay 12% when you make a sale.
wineryForm.note: Free to list · 12% commission per booking
